Hub Home > Writing & Copywriting > Blog Post Writer & Optimizer

Blog Post Writer & Optimizer

Write a complete, SEO-optimized blog post from a topic and target keyword — outline, full draft, meta tags, internal link suggestions, and a distribution plan. Produces publish-ready content, not a rough draft that needs heavy editing.

Beginner STEP BY STEP Revenue-driving
Pro tip

Give the AI your brand voice guide (or describe your tone) plus your target keyword. The best blog posts sound like a person talking, not a content mill producing.

blog SEO content writing blogging organic traffic content marketing

How to use this prompt

  1. Pick your AI model. Choose the tab for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini or Copilot — each variant is tuned for that model.
  2. Copy the full prompt. Click Copy Full Prompt to copy the text to your clipboard.
  3. Paste into your AI tool. Open your chosen model and paste the prompt into a new chat.
  4. Replace the [placeholders]. Swap any bracketed fields for your company name, audience, product or tone.
  5. Run and refine. Review the output. If anything is off, ask the AI to tighten tone, length or format.

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a content writer producing a blog post for a small business.

<post_brief>
Topic: [WHAT TO WRITE ABOUT]
Target keyword: [PRIMARY SEO KEYWORD]
Secondary keywords: [2-3 RELATED TERMS]
Target...
You are a content writer producing a blog post for a small business.

<post_brief>
Topic: [WHAT TO WRITE ABOUT]
Target keyword: [PRIMARY SEO KEYWORD]
Secondary keywords: [2-3 RELATED TERMS]
Target...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a content writer producing a blog post for a small business.

<post_brief>
Topic: [WHAT TO WRITE ABOUT]
Target keyword: [PRIMARY SEO KEYWORD]
Secondary keywords: [2-3 RELATED TERMS]
Target audience: [WHO reads this]
Goal: [educate / drive signups / build authority / generate leads]
Word count: [800-1200 / 1500-2000 / 2000+]
Tone: [describe or reference your brand voice guide]
CTA: [what you want readers to do after reading]
</post_brief>

<context>
Business: [YOUR_BUSINESS_TYPE]
Existing content to link to: [list URLs or topics of your other posts/pages]
Unique angle: [what makes your perspective different from what is already ranking?]
</context>

Write the complete post:

1. **Outline** — H2/H3 structure with keyword placement notes. Present for approval before writing.

2. **Full draft** — publish-ready. Opening hook that earns the scroll. Each section delivers value independently. Conclusion with clear CTA. No filler paragraphs.

3. **SEO elements:**
   - Title tag (under 60 chars)
   - Meta description (under 155 chars)
   - URL slug suggestion
   - Image alt text suggestions (3-4)
   - Internal link placements with anchor text

4. **Distribution plan** — 3 ways to repurpose this post: social snippets, email teaser, and one other format.

Write like a knowledgeable person explaining something to a peer, not like a content farm.
Notes: Claude produces long-form content with consistent quality and no padding. Present the outline first for approval — this prevents wasted effort on a wrong direction. Ask for the post in markdown for easy CMS import.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a content writer for a small business blog. Write like a real person, not a content farm.

Topic: [WHAT]
Keyword:...
Act as a content writer for a small business blog. Write like a real person, not a content farm.

Topic: [WHAT]
Keyword:...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a content writer for a small business blog. Write like a real person, not a content farm.

Topic: [WHAT]
Keyword: [PRIMARY]
Secondary keywords: [2-3]
Audience: [WHO]
Goal: [educate / signups / authority / leads]
Length: [word count]
Tone: [describe]
CTA: [desired action]

Business: [TYPE]
Existing content: [URLs/topics to link]
Unique angle: [your differentiator]

Deliver:
1. Outline with keyword placement — present first
2. Full publish-ready draft — hook, value per section, CTA conclusion
3. SEO: title tag, meta, URL slug, alt text, internal links
4. Distribution: social snippet, email teaser, one repurpose idea
Notes: Ask ChatGPT to search for what currently ranks for your keyword, then write something better. Follow up with "What does the #1 result cover that my draft doesn't?" for gap filling.
Gemini Gemini 3 Pro
FRESH APR 2026 
Write a blog post for my business.

**Topic:** [WHAT]
**Keyword:** [PRIMARY]
**Secondary:** [2-3 TERMS]
**Audience:**...
Write a blog post for my business.

**Topic:** [WHAT]
**Keyword:** [PRIMARY]
**Secondary:** [2-3 TERMS]
**Audience:**...

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Write a blog post for my business.

**Topic:** [WHAT]
**Keyword:** [PRIMARY]
**Secondary:** [2-3 TERMS]
**Audience:** [WHO]
**Goal:** [educate / signups / authority / leads]
**Length:** [word count]
**Tone:** [describe]
**CTA:** [action]
**Business:** [TYPE]
**Existing content:** [to link]
**Unique angle:** [differentiator]

Search for what currently ranks for my keyword, analyze the top 3 results, then:
1. Outline that fills gaps the ranking content misses
2. Full draft — publish-ready
3. SEO elements: title, meta, URL, alt text, internal links
4. Distribution plan: social, email, repurpose
Notes: Gemini can analyze the current SERP for your keyword and write content specifically designed to fill gaps. This is a major advantage — your post targets what is missing, not what already exists.
Copilot Copilot (Microsoft 365)
FRESH APR 2026 
Write a blog post for my business.

Topic: [WHAT]
Keyword:...
Write a blog post for my business.

Topic: [WHAT]
Keyword:...

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Write a blog post for my business.

Topic: [WHAT]
Keyword: [PRIMARY]
Secondary: [TERMS]
Audience: [WHO]
Goal: [educate / signups / authority / leads]
Length: [words]
Tone: [describe]
CTA: [action]
Business: [TYPE]
Link to: [existing content]
Angle: [differentiator]

Deliver:
1. Outline with keyword notes
2. Full draft, publish-ready
3. SEO: title, meta, URL, alt text, links
4. Distribution plan
Notes: Copilot can draft the post directly in Word with proper heading hierarchy and format it for your CMS. If using WordPress, ask for HTML-formatted output.

Frequently Asked Questions

What does the Blog Post Writer & Optimizer prompt do?

Write a complete, SEO-optimized blog post from a topic and target keyword — outline, full draft, meta tags, internal link suggestions, and a distribution plan. Produces publish-ready content, not a rough draft that needs heavy editing.

Which AI models is this prompt tested on?

This prompt is field-tested on Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Each model has its own optimized variant above.

Do I need a paid AI account to use this prompt?

No. This prompt is written to run on the free tier of Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Paid tiers simply give you longer context windows and faster responses.

Can I customize this prompt for my business?

Yes. Any text inside square brackets is a placeholder you replace with your own business details, such as company name, audience, product or tone. You can also ask the AI to adjust format, length or style after the first output.

When was this prompt last verified?

Each model variant above shows its own freshness stamp. AlignAI re-verifies every prompt at least monthly and rebuilds when a major model changes.
